requirement_topic.en: NEA Grid-Connection Standards — Anti-Islanding (IEC 62116), Net-Metering Rules, and 50 Hz / 230 V / 400 V Settings
requirement_topic.zh: NEA并网标准——防孤岛（IEC 62116）、净电量计量规则及50 Hz / 230 V / 400 V参数
requirement_topic.zht: NEA併網標準——防孤島（IEC 62116）、淨電量計量規則及50 Hz / 230 V / 400 V參數

summary.en: Nepal Electricity Authority (NEA) governs grid connection and net-metering for solar PV installations in Nepal. Key grid-connection requirements for PV inverters include: (1) IEC 62116 anti-islanding — inverters must detect loss of mains and disconnect automatically to protect NEA line workers; (2) IEC 61727 characteristics of the utility interface for PV systems; (3) compliance with NEA's net-metering regulations (Electricity Regulatory Commission net-metering rules, amended); (4) firmware and protection relay settings validated against Nepal's grid parameters of 50 Hz, single-phase 230 V, and three-phase 400 V. Nepal's grid is hydro-dominant with growing solar penetration for energy mix diversification and rural electrification. Inverter protection thresholds set for Chinese grid conditions (220/380 V under GB/T 156) must be re-parameterised and validated for Nepal's 230/400 V grid before NEA grid-connection approval.
summary.zh: 尼泊尔电力局（NEA）负责管理尼泊尔太阳能光伏装置的并网及净电量计量。光伏逆变器并网的主要要求包括：（1）IEC 62116防孤岛——逆变器须自动检测电网断电并断开，以保护NEA线路工人安全；（2）IEC 61727光伏系统电网接口特性；（3）符合NEA净电量计量法规（电力监管委员会净电量计量规则，经修订）；（4）固件和保护继电器整定须针对尼泊尔50 Hz、单相230 V、三相400 V电网参数进行验证。尼泊尔电网以水电为主，太阳能渗透率持续提升，用于能源多元化和农村电气化。针对中国电网条件（依据GB/T 156为220/380 V）整定的逆变器保护阈值，须重新参数化并验证，以符合尼泊尔230/400 V电网，方可获得NEA并网批准。
summary.zht: 尼泊爾電力局（NEA）負責管理尼泊爾太陽能光伏裝置的併網及淨電量計量。光伏逆變器併網的主要要求包括：（1）IEC 62116防孤島——逆變器須自動偵測電網斷電並斷開，以保護NEA線路工人安全；（2）IEC 61727光伏系統電網介面特性；（3）符合NEA淨電量計量法規（電力監管委員會淨電量計量規則，經修訂）；（4）韌體和保護繼電器整定須針對尼泊爾50 Hz、單相230 V、三相400 V電網參數進行驗證。尼泊爾電網以水電為主，太陽能滲透率持續提升，用於能源多元化和農村電氣化。針對中國電網條件（依據GB/T 156為220/380 V）整定的逆變器保護閾值，須重新參數化並驗證，以符合尼泊爾230/400 V電網，方可獲得NEA併網批准。

standards_or_laws: IEC 62116 — Utility-interconnected photovoltaic inverters — Test procedure of islanding prevention measures (anti-islanding requirement for NEA grid connection)
IEC 61727 — Photovoltaic (PV) systems — Characteristics of the utility interface (grid interface requirements for PV systems)
Nepal Electricity Regulatory Commission — Net-metering regulations (net-metering rules for grid-tied solar PV)
NEA grid parameters: 50 Hz, 230 V single-phase, 400 V three-phase

summary.en: Chinese grid-connection evidence commonly includes GB/T 19964-2024 (Technical Requirements for Connecting Photovoltaic Power Station to Power System, applicable to utility-scale PV via 10 kV and above), NB/T 32004 (inverter technical specifications), and domestic anti-islanding test results under Chinese grid conditions. These Chinese grid-connection documents are based on Chinese grid conditions and are not accepted as NEA grid-connection evidence. The key parameter difference is voltage: China's grid standard is 220/380 V at 50 Hz under GB/T 156, whereas Nepal NEA specifies 230/400 V at 50 Hz. Firmware protection thresholds validated for Chinese grid conditions must be re-parameterised and retested for Nepal NEA grid conditions before seeking grid-connection approval.
summary.zh: 中国并网证据通常包括GB/T 19964-2024（光伏发电站接入电力系统技术规定，适用于通过10 kV及以上接入的大型光伏电站）、NB/T 32004（逆变器技术规范）及在中国电网条件下的国内防孤岛测试结果。上述中国并网文件基于中国电网条件，不被NEA接受为并网证据。主要参数差异在于电压：中国电网标准依据GB/T 156为220/380 V 50 Hz，而尼泊尔NEA规定为230/400 V 50 Hz。针对中国电网条件验证的固件保护阈值，须重新参数化并针对尼泊尔NEA电网条件重新测试，方可申请并网审批。
summary.zht: 中國併網證據通常包括GB/T 19964-2024（光伏發電站接入電力系統技術規定，適用於通過10 kV及以上接入的大型光伏電站）、NB/T 32004（逆變器技術規範）及在中國電網條件下的國內防孤島測試結果。上述中國併網文件基於中國電網條件，不被NEA接受為併網證據。主要參數差異在於電壓：中國電網標準依據GB/T 156為220/380 V 50 Hz，而尼泊爾NEA規定為230/400 V 50 Hz。針對中國電網條件驗證的韌體保護閾值，須重新參數化並針對尼泊爾NEA電網條件重新測試，方可申請併網審批。

standards_or_laws: GB/T 19964-2024 — 光伏发电站接入电力系统技术规定 (Technical Requirements for Connecting Photovoltaic Power Station to Power System)
NB/T 32004-2018 — 光伏并网逆变器技术规范 (Technical Specification for Photovoltaic Grid-Connected Inverters)

gap.en: Gap: Chinese GB/T grid-connection documents do not satisfy NEA grid-connection requirements. Exporters must prepare: (a) IEC 62116 anti-islanding test report from an ILAC-accredited laboratory; (b) IEC 61727 grid interface compliance evidence; (c) harmonic emission compliance evidence per IEC 61000-3-2; (d) NEA net-metering application documentation confirming inverter model eligibility. Additionally, firmware protection thresholds and reconnection delays must be validated for Nepal's 230/400 V, 50 Hz grid — not the 220/380 V Chinese grid parameters. Where inverter firmware settings differ from the factory default for China, re-parameterisation should be documented and, if the change is material, re-tested under the applicable IEC standard.
gap.zh: 差距：中国GB/T并网文件不满足NEA并网要求。出口商须准备：（a）来自ILAC认可实验室的IEC 62116防孤岛测试报告；（b）IEC 61727电网接口合规证据；（c）符合IEC 61000-3-2的谐波排放合规证据；（d）确认逆变器型号资格的NEA净电量计量申请文件。此外，固件保护阈值和重连延迟须针对尼泊尔230/400 V、50 Hz电网进行验证，而非中国220/380 V电网参数。若逆变器固件设置与中国出厂默认设置不同，须记录重新参数化过程，如变更重要，应依据适用IEC标准重新测试。
gap.zht: 差距：中國GB/T併網文件不滿足NEA併網要求。出口商須準備：（a）來自ILAC認可實驗室的IEC 62116防孤島測試報告；（b）IEC 61727電網介面合規證據；（c）符合IEC 61000-3-2的諧波排放合規證據；（d）確認逆變器型號資格的NEA淨電量計量申請文件。此外，韌體保護閾值和重連延遲須針對尼泊爾230/400 V、50 Hz電網進行驗證，而非中國220/380 V電網參數。若逆變器韌體設置與中國出廠預設設置不同，須記錄重新參數化過程，如變更重要，應依據適用IEC標準重新測試。

mandatory_status.target: Mandatory for grid connection under NEA rules; anti-islanding and grid parameter compliance are non-negotiable gates for NEA net-metering and grid-connection approval
mandatory_status.cn: Chinese grid-connection evidence satisfies China's grid operator requirements but does not transfer to NEA Nepal grid-connection acceptance

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] NEA grid-connection requires IEC 62116 anti-islanding and IEC 61727 grid interface compliance — neither is covered by Chinese GB/T grid certificates. Re-parameterise inverter firmware for Nepal's 230/400 V at 50 Hz grid before testing and document the configuration. Verify current NEA net-metering regulations and connection conditions directly with NEA and the Electricity Regulatory Commission before finalising the equipment compliance package.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] NEA并网要求IEC 62116防孤岛和IEC 61727电网接口合规——上述均未被中国GB/T并网证书覆盖。测试前须将逆变器固件重新参数化为尼泊尔230/400 V 50 Hz电网参数，并记录配置。在最终确定设备合规包前，请直接向NEA和电力监管委员会核实现行NEA净电量计量法规及接入条件。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] NEA併網要求IEC 62116防孤島和IEC 61727電網介面合規——上述均未被中國GB/T併網證書覆蓋。測試前須將逆變器韌體重新參數化為尼泊爾230/400 V 50 Hz電網參數，並記錄配置。在最終確定設備合規包前，請直接向NEA和電力監管委員會核實現行NEA淨電量計量法規及接入條件。

requirement_topic.en: AEPC Distributed and Off-Grid Solar Programme — Quality Standards and Equipment Eligibility
requirement_topic.zh: AEPC分布式及离网太阳能计划——质量标准及设备资格
requirement_topic.zht: AEPC分散式及離網太陽能計畫——品質標準及設備資格

summary.en: The Alternative Energy Promotion Centre (AEPC) governs subsidised off-grid and distributed solar programmes for rural electrification in Nepal, including the Rural Energy Fund and Renewable Energy Subsidy Policy. AEPC requires: (a) equipment to meet AEPC technical quality standards, which reference IEC standards for inverters and solar PV components; (b) installation by AEPC-approved service companies or contractors; (c) compliance with AEPC's specification for inverters, including safety and performance criteria derived from IEC 62109 and IEC 61727; (d) AEPC subsidy claim documentation confirming equipment model eligibility. Chinese PV inverters supplied to AEPC-subsidised projects must pass AEPC technical review as a condition of subsidy eligibility and programme participation.
summary.zh: 替代能源推广中心（AEPC）负责管理尼泊尔农村电气化的补贴离网及分布式太阳能计划，包括农村能源基金和可再生能源补贴政策。AEPC要求：（a）设备满足AEPC技术质量标准，该标准引用IEC逆变器和光伏组件标准；（b）由AEPC认可的服务公司或承包商安装；（c）符合AEPC逆变器规格，包括源自IEC 62109和IEC 61727的安全和性能标准；（d）确认设备型号资格的AEPC补贴申请文件。供应至AEPC补贴项目的中国光伏逆变器须通过AEPC技术审查，作为补贴资格和项目参与的条件。
summary.zht: 替代能源推廣中心（AEPC）負責管理尼泊爾農村電氣化的補貼離網及分散式太陽能計畫，包括農村能源基金和可再生能源補貼政策。AEPC要求：（a）設備滿足AEPC技術品質標準，該標準引用IEC逆變器和光伏組件標準；（b）由AEPC認可的服務公司或承包商安裝；（c）符合AEPC逆變器規格，包括源自IEC 62109和IEC 61727的安全和性能標準；（d）確認設備型號資格的AEPC補貼申請文件。供應至AEPC補貼項目的中國光伏逆變器須通過AEPC技術審查，作為補貼資格和項目參與的條件。

standards_or_laws: AEPC Technical Standards for Solar PV Inverters — references IEC 62109 and IEC 61727 for safety and grid-interface performance
Nepal Renewable Energy Subsidy Policy — AEPC equipment eligibility requirements for subsidised solar programmes
AEPC Rural Energy Fund — quality and technical criteria for programme participation

summary.en: China does not have a direct equivalent programme for off-grid rural electrification subsidies with IEC-based equipment eligibility criteria. Subsidised distributed solar in China is governed by National Energy Administration (NEA China) distributed PV policies and grid operator connection rules, referencing domestic standards (NB/T 32004, GB/T 37408-2021, GB/T 19964-2024). These Chinese distributed connection rules and subsidy frameworks are not applicable in Nepal and do not give any presumption of compliance with AEPC programme requirements. Chinese manufacturers seeking to supply AEPC-subsidised projects must obtain AEPC technical approval on the basis of IEC-referenced evidence, not Chinese domestic certifications alone.
summary.zh: 中国没有直接对应的具备基于IEC设备资格标准的离网农村电气化补贴计划。中国补贴分布式太阳能受国家能源局（NEA中国）分布式光伏政策及电网运营商接入规则管理，引用国内标准（NB/T 32004、GB/T 37408-2021、GB/T 19964-2024）。上述中国分布式并网规则和补贴框架不适用于尼泊尔，不给予AEPC计划要求的任何合规推定。希望供应AEPC补贴项目的中国制造商须基于IEC依据证据取得AEPC技术批准，而非仅凭中国国内认证。
summary.zht: 中國沒有直接對應的具備基於IEC設備資格標準的離網農村電氣化補貼計畫。中國補貼分散式太陽能受國家能源局（NEA中國）分散式光伏政策及電網運營商接入規則管理，引用國內標準（NB/T 32004、GB/T 37408-2021、GB/T 19964-2024）。上述中國分散式併網規則和補貼框架不適用於尼泊爾，不給予AEPC計畫要求的任何合規推定。希望供應AEPC補貼項目的中國製造商須基於IEC依據證據取得AEPC技術批准，而非僅憑中國國內認證。

standards_or_laws: NB/T 32004-2018 — 光伏并网逆变器技术规范 (Technical Specification for Photovoltaic Grid-Connected Inverters)
GB/T 37408-2021 — 光伏并网逆变器技术要求 (Technical Requirements for Photovoltaic Grid-Connected Inverters)
GB/T 19964-2024 — 光伏发电站接入电力系统技术规定 (Technical Requirements for Connecting Photovoltaic Power Station to Power System)

gap.en: Gap: Chinese inverters for Nepal AEPC-subsidised projects must be technically approved by AEPC on the basis of IEC-referenced evidence. Chinese domestic solar connection approvals and certifications do not transfer to AEPC programme requirements. Confirm inverter model eligibility, IEC safety and performance test evidence, and service company registration with AEPC before committing product to subsidised rural solar programmes. Nepal's significant import volume from China and India means Chinese products are commonly supplied — but AEPC technical review remains a separate and mandatory gate.
gap.zh: 差距：用于尼泊尔AEPC补贴项目的中国逆变器须基于IEC依据证据取得AEPC技术批准。中国国内太阳能并网审批和认证不能转移至AEPC计划要求。在将产品用于补贴农村太阳能计划前，请向AEPC确认逆变器型号资格、IEC安全和性能测试证据及服务公司注册状态。尼泊尔从中国和印度进口量较大，中国产品较为常见——但AEPC技术审查仍是独立的强制门槛。
gap.zht: 差距：用於尼泊爾AEPC補貼項目的中國逆變器須基於IEC依據證據取得AEPC技術批准。中國國內太陽能併網審批和認證不能轉移至AEPC計畫要求。在將產品用於補貼農村太陽能計畫前，請向AEPC確認逆變器型號資格、IEC安全和性能測試證據及服務公司登記狀態。尼泊爾從中國和印度進口量較大，中國產品較為常見——但AEPC技術審查仍是獨立的強制門檻。

mandatory_status.target: Mandatory for all inverters supplied to AEPC-subsidised rural solar programmes; AEPC technical review and equipment approval are non-negotiable conditions for subsidy eligibility
mandatory_status.cn: Chinese distributed solar connection approvals are granted under China NEA (China) policy and grid operator rules — not transferable to Nepal AEPC programme requirements

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] AEPC is a separate equipment approval gate from any Chinese domestic solar certification. Confirm inverter model eligibility and IEC compliance evidence with AEPC and the AEPC-approved service company before project submission for subsidised rural solar programmes. Verify current AEPC technical standards, subsidy policy criteria, and equipment eligibility requirements directly at aepc.gov.np before committing to supply.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] AEPC是独立于任何中国国内太阳能认证的设备审批门槛。在为补贴农村太阳能计划提交项目前，请与AEPC及AEPC认可服务公司确认逆变器型号资格和IEC合规证据。在承诺供货前，请直接在aepc.gov.np核实现行AEPC技术标准、补贴政策标准及设备资格要求。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] AEPC是獨立於任何中國國內太陽能認證的設備審批門檻。在為補貼農村太陽能計畫提交項目前，請與AEPC及AEPC認可服務公司確認逆變器型號資格和IEC合規證據。在承諾供貨前，請直接在aepc.gov.np核實現行AEPC技術標準、補貼政策標準及設備資格要求。
